response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No vocal music or speech was detected in the video (instrumental background music only). 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference JSON was correctly identified as empty/null for vocals. Subtitles were manually generated based on on-screen text events (Trigger 2). 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the prominent, informational concert and merch sales text slides to their exact visual durations. Accounted for the video's exact 190-second loop structure to match the second occurrence of the slides.
